common.name: Name
common.copyFailed: Copy failed, please manually select and copy text

home.description: Upload dictionary files, compare version differences, and search entries by taxonomy

config.title: Configure Parsing Rules
config.desc: Each dictionary has different formatting. Before uploading, create a JSON configuration file to tell the platform how to identify headwords, sense numbers, phonetics, parts of speech, etc.
config.tip: Refer to the built-in example configurations and adjust them according to your dictionary format.

upload.title: Upload Dictionary Files
upload.desc: After creating a dictionary entry, upload different versions of your dictionary files (supports .txt / .docx / .doc / .pdf). The platform will automatically parse the entry structure and build a searchable database.
upload.tip: Upload each version separately. Once parsing is complete, you can start comparing.

compare.title: Version Comparison
compare.desc: Select two versions of the same dictionary to initiate a comparison. The platform will automatically calculate additions, deletions, and definition changes, displaying differences side-by-side with filtering by change type and Excel report export.
compare.tip: Viewing comparison details consumes unlock quota. Trial users have 100 words lifetime.

taxonomy.title: Taxonomy (Optional)
taxonomy.desc1: If you have a classification system file (such as a semantic taxonomy), you can upload it to the platform. Once uploaded, comparison results can be filtered and sorted by taxonomy, enabling semantic analysis of version differences.
taxonomy.desc2: Taxonomy files also require a corresponding parsing configuration. After uploading and activation, you can choose to sort by taxonomy in the version comparison export options.

donation.title: Long-term Use? Consider Supporting Us
donation.desc: Supporters get more book slots and monthly entry unlock quotas to support in-depth dictionary research. This is a non-profit platform; all donations go towards server and domain maintenance costs.

upload.dragFile: Drag or click to upload dictionary file
upload.dragConfig: Drag or click to upload format config file
upload.configDesc: Format config file defines headword recognition rules, sense number patterns, etc.
upload.cacheHitResult: Reused an existing parse result without re-running the full parser

rewards.permanent: Permanent energy: Accumulates permanently after purchase, never expires

versionDetail.detachedFileTitle: This version is detached from its file
versionDetail.detachedFileDescription: Historical uploads and parsing records are retained, but this version currently has no active file. Re-uploading will attach a file again and continue parsing.
versionDetail.reuploadWarning: Re-uploading a new file will replace current parsing results and deduct energy for this version. If it's just a code bug, use 'Reparse' button (same file won't be charged).
versionDetail.reuploadReplaceHint: Re-upload will replace current file and trigger reparsing:
versionDetail.reparseConfirmMessage: Reparsing will clear all parsed entries, senses, examples for this version, plus related comparison records, then reparse with the uploaded original file. Continue?
versionDetail.deleteFileConfirmMessage: Deleting a file detaches this version from the file and its parse result. Parsed data and comparison records for this version will be cleared. Continue?
versionDetail.deleteFileSuccess: File reference detached, you can re-upload

platformIntro.title: Platform Introduction
platformIntro.description1: Dictionary Research Platform is a non-profit auxiliary tool for dictionary learners and researchers, designed to help users compare differences between dictionary versions, track semantic evolution, and assist in language learning and academic research.
platformIntro.description2: This platform is independently developed and maintained by an individual, not affiliated with any commercial organization or publisher, and has no commercial profit purpose.

declaration.title: Important Declaration
declaration.notice: This platform does not provide any dictionary data
declaration.description: The platform only provides technical services and does not store or distribute any copyright-protected dictionary content. Users must obtain legally authorized dictionary files themselves and upload them to the platform for personal learning use. The platform is not responsible for the legality of user-uploaded content.

items.0: All platform functions are for personal learning and non-commercial research use only
items.1: Please do not upload copyright-protected files that you do not have rights to
items.2: Platform data is not publicly accessible; user data is isolated from each other

versionCompare.name: Version Comparison
versionCompare.description: Upload different versions of the same dictionary, automatically compare entry additions/deletions and definition changes, and display differences intuitively.

headwordSearch.name: Entry Search
headwordSearch.description: Quickly search entries across versions, view definitions and examples in each version.

taxonomy.name: Taxonomy
taxonomy.description: Import custom classification systems, organize and browse entries by semantic category.

export.name: Export Report
export.description: Export comparison results to Excel format for further organization and research.

donation.title: Support Us
donation.costs: Platform operation requires certain actual costs, including:

costItems.0: Cloud server and object storage fees

donation.description: If this platform helps your learning or research, welcome to support platform operation through voluntary donations. All donations will be used entirely for platform maintenance, with no commercial use.
donation.note: Note: Donation is voluntary, not a service purchase. To thank supporters, the platform will provide higher usage quotas as a gift. See the Subscription Plans page for details. For questions or suggestions, please scan the QR code in the top right corner to contact the developer.

diff.selectEntry: Please select an entry from the list

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Please read the following terms carefully

service.title: I. Service Statement
service.p1: This platform ("Dictionary Version Comparison and Analysis Platform") is a technical service tool for academic research, providing users with technical support services such as dictionary data parsing, comparison, and analysis.
service.p2: This platform does NOT provide any copyright-protected dictionary content. All dictionary data is uploaded by users themselves.

userResponsibility.title: II. User Responsibilities
userResponsibility.p1: When using this platform's services, you should:
userResponsibility.item1: Ensure uploaded dictionary files are data you legally own or have legally authorized
userResponsibility.item2: Not upload content that infringes on third-party intellectual property rights (including but not limited to copyright, trademark rights)
userResponsibility.item3: Bear full legal responsibility for all content you upload
userResponsibility.item4: Comply with relevant laws and regulations of the People's Republic of China

ip.title: III. Intellectual Property Statement
ip.p1: The intellectual property rights of dictionary files and their content uploaded by you belong to you or the original rights holder. This platform only provides technical processing services and makes no claims regarding the ownership of intellectual property rights to your uploaded content.
ip.p2: The intellectual property rights of comparison results, analysis reports, etc. generated by your use of this platform's services belong to you.

disclaimer.title: IV. Disclaimer
disclaimer.p1: This platform does not guarantee the legality, accuracy, or completeness of user-uploaded content. Users bear full responsibility for any legal disputes arising from uploaded content.
disclaimer.p2: This platform reserves the right to delete content suspected of infringement based on legal requirements or complaints, and to report to relevant authorities.

security.title: V. Account Security
security.p1: You should properly safeguard your account password and bear legal responsibility for all actions under your account. If you discover your account has been compromised, please notify this platform immediately.

changes.title: VI. Agreement Changes
changes.p1: This platform reserves the right to modify this agreement at any time. The modified agreement will be published on the platform, and continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the modified agreement.

other.title: VII. Other
other.p1: The right to interpret this agreement belongs to this platform. In case of disputes, both parties should resolve them through friendly negotiation; if negotiation fails, either party may file a lawsuit with the people's court having jurisdiction at the location of this platform.
